Name: FPropertyPathSegment
Description: A struct used for caching part of a property path.  Don't use this class directly.

Variables.Name: Name
Variables.Description: The sub-component of the property path, a single value between .'s of the path

Variables.Name: Struct
Variables.Description: The cached Class or ScriptStruct that was used last to resolve Name to a property.

Variables.Name: Field
Variables.Description:
The cached property on the Struct that this Name resolved to on it last time Resolve was called, if 
	  the Struct doesn't change, this value is returned to avoid performing another Field lookup.
